---
title: "Browse manifestos"
subtitle: "Click any row to open its full evidence page"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("_data.R")
library(reactable); library(htmltools)

manifestos <- load_manifestos()
models <- available_models()

# Per-model aggregated scores merged onto manifestos
m_aggs <- map(names(models), load_model_agg) |> setNames(names(models))

# Wide table: one row per manifesto, one col per (model × headline dim)
wide <- manifestos |>
  select(doc_id, countryname, partyabbrev, partyname, year, language)
for (mid in names(m_aggs)) {
  a <- m_aggs[[mid]]
  if (is.null(a)) next
  for (d in c("populism_overall","liberalism_overall")) {
    if (!d %in% names(a)) next
    wide[[paste0(d, "_", mid)]] <- a[[d]][match(wide$doc_id, a$doc_id)]
  }
}

# Cross-model mean of populism_overall (where ≥2 models present)
pop_cols <- grep("^populism_overall_", names(wide), value = TRUE)
lib_cols <- grep("^liberalism_overall_", names(wide), value = TRUE)
if (length(pop_cols) > 0) {
  wide$pop_mean <- rowMeans(wide[pop_cols], na.rm = TRUE)
  wide$pop_mean[is.nan(wide$pop_mean)] <- NA
  wide$lib_mean <- rowMeans(wide[lib_cols], na.rm = TRUE)
  wide$lib_mean[is.nan(wide$lib_mean)] <- NA
}
# Linkable label column
wide$linkcol <- sprintf('<a href="manifesto/%s.html">%s</a>',
                       wide$doc_id, wide$partyabbrev)
```

```{r table, echo=FALSE}
score_col_def <- function(name) {
  reactable::colDef(
    name = name, align = "center", maxWidth = 90,
    style = function(value) {
      if (is.na(value)) return(list(color = "#bbb"))
      band <- score_band(value)
      bg <- switch(band, low = "#d6e4f0", mid = "#faf4d4", high = "#f0c7c7", "na" = "#eee")
      list(background = bg, fontWeight = 600)
    },
    cell = function(value) if (is.na(value)) "–" else sprintf("%.1f", value)
  )
}

# Build column definitions dynamically: only columns that actually exist in `wide`
all_cols <- names(wide)
col_defs <- list(
  linkcol     = colDef(name = "Party",       html = TRUE, minWidth = 90),
  countryname = colDef(name = "Country",     minWidth = 130),
  partyname   = colDef(name = "Full Name",   minWidth = 250),
  year        = colDef(name = "Year",        align = "center", maxWidth = 70),
  language    = colDef(name = "Lang",        align = "center", maxWidth = 70, show = FALSE)
)
if ("pop_mean" %in% all_cols) col_defs$pop_mean <- score_col_def("Pop ⌀")
if ("lib_mean" %in% all_cols) col_defs$lib_mean <- score_col_def("Lib ⌀")

model_short <- c(sonnet = "Sonnet", gpt41mini = "GPT", gemini = "Gemini")
for (mid in names(model_short)) {
  pc <- paste0("populism_overall_", mid)
  lc <- paste0("liberalism_overall_", mid)
  if (pc %in% all_cols) col_defs[[pc]] <- score_col_def(paste0("Pop·", model_short[mid]))
  if (lc %in% all_cols) col_defs[[lc]] <- score_col_def(paste0("Lib·", model_short[mid]))
}

select_cols <- c("linkcol","countryname","partyname","year")
if ("language" %in% all_cols) select_cols <- c(select_cols, "language")
select_cols <- c(select_cols,
                 intersect(c("pop_mean","lib_mean"), all_cols),
                 grep("^populism_overall_", all_cols, value = TRUE),
                 grep("^liberalism_overall_", all_cols, value = TRUE))

reactable(
  wide |> select(all_of(select_cols)),
  filterable = TRUE, searchable = TRUE, defaultPageSize = 25,
  showPageSizeOptions = TRUE, pageSizeOptions = c(25, 50, 100, 250),
  highlight = TRUE,
  columns = col_defs[intersect(names(col_defs), select_cols)],
  defaultSorted = list(year = "desc"),
  striped = TRUE, bordered = TRUE, compact = TRUE
)
```

::: {.callout-tip}
**Tip:** click a party abbreviation to open the per-manifesto page with every
score, every model, every verbatim quote.
:::
